title: UCLA Generative AI Policy Report - May 2026
summary: UCLA has public generative AI guidance through UCLA Digital & Technology Solutions and UCLA Academic Senate sources. The approved claims cover Student Conduct Code framing for AI-assisted coursework, DTS-listed GenAI tools, restricted data categories for AI input, and instructor guidance to communicate course expectations. These are source-backed staged claims, not canonical university conclusions.
limitations: This run is a snapshot of public UCLA AI guidance available on May 11, 2026.
Course-level AI policies may vary by instructor and department.
The DTS tool list and data-classification guidance may change; linked official pages remain the source of record.
This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official UCLA statement.
sourceRightsPolicy: Official source pages retain their original rights. Tracker metadata is open licensed; source text is quoted only as short evidence.
